report: Violation e730cfce-7399-4809-b03c-bedbf9b01c1b recorded on 2026-03-19T13:54:54.257969+00:00 for vehicle UNREADABLE at Crosswalk A. The vehicle failed to yield to a pedestrian moving STATIC within the marked crosswalk.
legal_explanation: The observed conduct constitutes a crosswalk right-of-way violation because the vehicle entered the crosswalk while a pedestrian had lawful priority of movement.
payment_instructions: Pay $150.00 to City Traffic Enforcement Unit within 30 days using the reference number listed on the invoice.
